metadata.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: bilingual (EN/ES) commands, portable skill, and machine-checked gate. No code before approved spec and consistent plan.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: SDD workflow commands (/sdd:help, /sdd:new, /sdd:spec, /sdd:gate, /sdd:decision, /sdd:close, /sdd:tutor) plus the portable sdd-workflow skill. Bilingual EN/ES.
